---
title: "Dorsum_environment"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-11"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r prep data, echo = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")

avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_averaged_allpop.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
lum <- avg_img %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, pl_code, dblMean, dblSD, uvMean, uvSD, area, Age, pop, lat, lon, Year, prepartor) %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY")

lum_summarized <- lum %>%
  group_by(ID, Age, pop, lat, lon,Year, prepartor, pl_code) %>%
  summarise(
    dblMean = mean(dblMean),
    dblSD = mean(dblSD),
    uvMean = mean(uvMean),
    uvSD = mean(uvSD),
    area = mean(area),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

lum_wide <- lum_summarized %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = pl_code, values_from = c(dblMean, dblSD, uvMean, uvSD, area), names_sep = "_" )


# combine w environment data  
env <- read.table(here("data/EnvClimNA_by_individual_specimen_samples.txt"), header = T)


lum_env <- merge(lum_wide, env)

head(lum_env)



```

## Does location predict color ? 

```{r lat vs dorsum, echo = F}

#perform linear regression
z <- lm(dblMean_d~lat, data = lum_env, na.action = na.exclude)
sum_z <- summary(z)

# Extract the r^2 and p-value
r2adj <- sum_z$adj.r.squared
p_value <- sum_z$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# Format the text to include rho and p-value, ready to be used in annotations
text_annotation <- bquote("Adjusted R"^2 ~ ": " ~ .(sprintf("%.2f", r2adj)) ~ ", p-value: " ~ .(sprintf("%.3f", p_value)))


ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = lat, y = dblMean_d)) + 
  geom_point(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Latitude", y = "Luminance (brightness)") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = lat, y = dblMean_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  theme_classic() +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

```

# Build model for env-dorsum correlation

```{r model performance, echo = F}

library(car)
library(performance)

lum_sel <- lum_wide %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, pop, Year, prepartor, dblMean_d, lat, lon) %>% 
  na.omit()

lum_env <- merge(lum_sel, env)

z <- lmer(dblMean_d ~ PPT_sm + PPT_sp + Tave_sm + Tave_sp + srtm + lat + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor) + (1|pop), data = lum_env)

check_model(z)
vif_values <- vif(z)

# Visualizing VIF
barplot(vif_values, col = "skyblue", main = "Variance Inflation Factor (VIF)")

compare_performance(z)

# Visualizing the model
plot(z, which = 1, main = "Model Fit")

```


```{r lmm pheno-env, echo = F}

library(lmerTest)
library(MASS)
library(MuMIn)
library(performance)


# including bio 10 (mean temp warmest quarter), bio18 (mean precip warmest quarter), elev

lumenv_sel <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(pop, Year, prepartor, dblMean_d, bio_10, bio_18, srtm, lat, lon) %>% 
  na.omit()

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_d ~ bio_10 + bio_18 + srtm + lat + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor) + (1|pop), data = lumenv_sel)


check_model(z)
summary(z)

dredge(z)

norand <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(dblMean_d, bio_10, bio_18, srtm, lat)
# stepwise model selection
full <- lm(dblMean_d ~(.)^4, data = norand) # includes 3-way interactions

z <- stepAIC(z, direction="both")

summary(z)
plot(z)
anova(z)
logLik(z) # include df
AIC(z)    # AIC score


```

```{r lmm climNA pheno-env, echo = F}

library(lmerTest)
library(MASS)
library(MuMIn)
library(performance)


# including bio 10 (mean temp warmest quarter), bio18 (mean precip warmest quarter), elev

lumenv_sel <- lum_env %>% 
  dplyr::select(pop, Year, prepartor, dblMean_d, PPT_sm, PPT_sp, Tave_sm, Tave_sp, srtm, lat, lon) %>% 
  na.omit()

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_d ~ PPT_sm + PPT_sp + Tave_sm + Tave_sp + srtm + lat +  (1|pop), data = lumenv_sel)


check_model(z)
summary(z)

dredge(z)


```


```{r plot}

ggplot(data = lumenv_sel, aes(x = bio_10, y = dblMean_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point()



```
